comment: Published lyrics by Ira Gershwin. Verse (Moderato, C major) mm1-22 + Refrain (brightly and rhythmically, F major) mm23-56. Pipeline coverage ~75%. Verse has two large GAP runs (mm9-11) and a zero-note detection error on m7 ('Blues?'). Refrain has 'Refrain' stage direction read as lyric (m18), several OCR garbles (mm31,41,42,48), and pickup syllables lost to note-count undercount in mm25,29. Instrumental GAPs at mm22,38,50,54,56 are correct (no vocal lyrics in PDF).

7.comment: Pipeline detected 0 notes, 1 rest. PDF shows whole note on 'Blues?' — 1 rest converted to note via injection (#103).

9.comment: GAP 3n. Pipeline had no lyrics. PDF: 'If_ you want' — 3 syllables on 3 notes.

10.comment: GAP 3n. Pipeline had no lyrics. PDF: 'this_ old world' — 3 syllables on 3 notes.

11.comment: GAP 4n. Pipeline had no lyrics. PDF: 'on_ a' — 2 syllables carried over 4 notes (tied figure).

14.comment: Pipeline had ['danc','ing','shoes'] missing comma. PDF: 'danc-ing shoes,'.

18.comment: Pipeline read 'Refrain' stage direction as first lyric. Actual lyrics: 'danc-ing shoes,' (repeat of m14). PDF shows 'Refrain (brightly and rhythmically)' is a performance direction above the staff, not a sung word.

22.comment: GAP 1n. Instrumental transition (Db-D-Eb modulation). No vocal lyrics in PDF.

25.comment: Pipeline had ['keep','on']. PDF: 'Or keep on' — 3 syllables but pipeline detected only 2 notes. Providing ['Or','keep'] to capture the phrase-initial 'Or'; 'on' displaced to m26 onset or lost to note-count undercount.

29.comment: Pipeline had ['walk','on']. PDF: 'and walk on' — 3 syllables but pipeline detected only 2 notes. Providing ['and','walk']; 'on' displaced or lost to note-count undercount.

31.comment: Pipeline had ['Shall..','we'] — stray OCR dots. PDF: 'Shall_ we'.

38.comment: GAP 1n. Sustained/tied whole note continuing 'care?' from m37. No new lyrics in PDF.

41.comment: Pipeline had ['We're','grow','mg'] — 'mg' is OCR misread of 'ing'. PDF: 'We're grow-ing'.

42.comment: Pipeline had ['old','e1;'] — 'e1;' is OCR garble for 'er,'. PDF: 'old - er,_'.

45.comment: GAP. Pipeline had no lyrics (2 notes, 1 rest). PDF: 'an al-so' — 3 syllables but only 2 notes detected. Providing 2 syllables; third syllable 'so' lost to note-count undercount. Part of compound word 'also-ran' split across mm45-46.

48.comment: Pipeline had ['dance.','lit','tle','la.','dy,'] — stray periods on 'dance.' and 'la.' from OCR. PDF: 'dance, lit-tle la-dy,'.

50.comment: GAP 1n. Whole note sustained from 'man!' in m49. No new lyrics in PDF.

54.comment: GAP 1n. First ending — instrumental (tied note + rest). No vocal lyrics in PDF.

56.comment: GAP 1n. Second ending — final instrumental cutoff. No vocal lyrics in PDF.
